faq.heading: Frequently Asked
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know about Merrily Plan.
faq.a1: Yes! The Free plan includes all 32 planning tabs, offline local storage, JSON export/import, and browser print support. No account required, no credit card, no trial period.
faq.q2: What devices does Merrily Plan work on?
faq.a2: Merrily Plan works on Web (any modern browser), Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and Linux. It is a Progressive Web App (PWA) that you can install on any device.
faq.q3: Do I need an internet connection?
faq.a3: No! The Free plan works entirely offline using your browser local storage. Your data never leaves your device unless you choose to upgrade to Pro for cloud sync.
faq.a4: Merrily Plan is available in 10 languages: English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Italian, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, and Hindi.
faq.q5: How is Merrily Plan different from other wedding planners?
faq.a5: Merrily Plan offers 32+ dedicated planning tools in a single app, works completely offline without requiring an account, supports 6 platforms natively, and gives you full data ownership with JSON export. Most competitors require accounts and store your data on their servers.
faq.q6: Can I collaborate with my partner or wedding planner?
faq.a6: Yes! The Pro plan includes real-time collaboration, plan sharing, and team access so your partner, family members, or wedding planner can work together seamlessly.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is the free plan really free forever?
faq.a1: Yes! The free plan includes all 32 planning tabs, offline storage, and JSON export/import. No credit card required, no trial period, no hidden fees.
faq.q2: Can I upgrade or downgrade at any time?
faq.a2: Absolutely. You can upgrade to Pro whenever you need cloud sync or collaboration features. Your free-tier data is preserved. You can downgrade anytime too -- your data stays on your device.
faq.q3: Do I need to create an account for the free plan?
faq.a3: No! The free plan works entirely offline using your browser's local storage. No account, no email, no sign-up. Just open the app and start planning.
faq.q4: What happens to my data if I cancel Pro?
faq.a4: Your data remains on your device and in your local storage. You can export it as JSON at any time. Cloud sync will stop, but nothing is deleted.
faq.a5: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all Pro subscriptions. If you're not satisfied, contact us for a full refund.
faq.q6: Can professional wedding planners use this for multiple clients?
faq.a6: Yes! With the Pro plan, you get unlimited wedding plans, making it perfect for professional planners managing multiple weddings simultaneously.

cta.subheading: No credit card required. Start with the free plan today.

faq.heading: Wedding Checklist
faq.q1: When should I start planning my wedding?
faq.a1: Ideally 12-18 months before your wedding date. This gives you enough time for venue booking, vendor selection, and all the details. However, weddings can be successfully planned in as little as 3-6 months.
faq.q2: What is the first thing to do when planning a wedding?
faq.a2: Set your budget and determine your priorities as a couple. Everything else -- venue, guest list, vendors -- flows from your budget. Merrily Plan helps you do this with dedicated Budget and Priorities tabs.
faq.q3: How much does the average wedding cost?
faq.a3: The average U.S. wedding costs around $35,000-$40,000 (2025), but this varies enormously by region. Urban weddings typically cost 40-60% more than rural ones. Use our Budget Tracker to stay on top of spending.
faq.q4: Can I plan a wedding in 3 months?
faq.a4: Yes! Focus on securing a venue, officiant, and photographer first. Skip custom details that need long lead times (custom invitations, custom dress). Merrily Plan prioritized task list helps you focus on what matters most with short timelines.
faq.q5: Do I need a wedding planner?
faq.a5: Not necessarily. A digital tool like Merrily Plan gives you 32+ planning tabs covering everything a professional planner would handle. For complex or large weddings, a professional planner combined with Merrily Plan is an excellent combination.

hero.heading: Plan Your Wedding with
hero.subheading: Let AI handle the complexity of wedding planning. Smart budget allocation, automated timelines, intelligent vendor questions -- all while you stay in control.

howItWorks.heading: How AI Wedding Planning
howItWorks.subheading: Three simple steps to smarter wedding planning.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us your wedding date, budget, guest count, location, and priorities. The more details you provide, the smarter the suggestions.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI analyzes your inputs against real wedding data and generates personalized recommendations for budgets, timelines, vendors, and more.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Review suggestions, customize them to your taste, and use Merrily Plan's 32+ tools to execute your plan. AI adapts as your plans evolve.

features.heading: AI-Powered
features.subheading: Intelligent tools that make wedding planning faster, smarter, and less stressful.
features.budgetDesc: AI analyzes your total budget, guest count, and location to suggest optimal spending across categories like venue, catering, photography, and decor.
features.timelineDesc: Enter your wedding date and AI creates a personalized month-by-month task list with deadlines, prioritized based on your specific wedding plans.
features.vendorDesc: AI generates tailored questions for each vendor type -- photographers, caterers, florists, DJs -- so you never forget to ask important contract details.
features.seatingDesc: AI helps arrange seating by analyzing guest relationships, avoiding conflicts, grouping families, and balancing table sizes for harmonious reception seating.
features.dayOfDesc: AI generates a detailed hour-by-hour wedding day schedule including prep, ceremony, photos, reception, and transitions with realistic time buffers.
features.contentDesc: Get AI-generated ideas for vows, toasts, wedding website text, invitation wording, and thank-you notes tailored to your style and relationship.

aiAssists.heading: AI Assists,
aiAssists.description: We believe AI should enhance your planning experience, not replace your personal touch. Every suggestion is just that -- a suggestion. You always have full control over your wedding decisions.
aiAssists.point1: AI suggestions are clearly labeled and always optional
aiAssists.point2: Your data privacy is protected -- we never sell your information
aiAssists.point3: Human creativity + AI efficiency = the perfect combination
aiAssists.point4: Works alongside professional wedding planners, not against them
aiAssists.aiSuggestionText: Based on your $30,000 budget and 120 guests, I recommend allocating 45% to venue and catering, 12% to photography...
aiAssists.yourDecisionText: Looks good! I will increase the photography budget to 15% since photos are our top priority.

testimonial.quote: The AI budget suggestions saved us hours of research. It knew the average costs for our area and helped us allocate our budget realistically.
testimonial.name: Emily & Jordan

faq.heading: AI Wedding Planning
faq.q1: How does AI wedding planning work?
faq.a1: Merrily Plan uses AI to analyze your wedding details -- budget, guest count, location, priorities -- and generates smart suggestions for budget allocation, timeline tasks, vendor questions, and more. You always remain in control and can accept, modify, or ignore any suggestion.
faq.q2: Is AI wedding planning safe? Will my data be shared?
faq.a2: Your privacy is our priority. AI suggestions are generated based on your inputs, and we never sell your data to third parties. On the Free plan, your data never even leaves your device. On Pro, data is encrypted in transit and at rest.
faq.q3: Can AI replace a human wedding planner?
faq.a3: AI is a powerful assistant, not a replacement. It excels at data-driven tasks like budget optimization, timeline generation, and vendor comparison. For creative decisions, venue visits, and day-of coordination, a human planner adds irreplaceable value. Many professional planners use Merrily Plan alongside their expertise.
faq.q4: What AI features are included in the Free plan?
faq.a4: The Free plan includes all 32 planning tools and basic organizational features. Advanced AI-powered suggestions (smart budget allocation, AI-generated timelines, intelligent vendor questions) are available in the Pro plan at $9/month.
faq.q5: How accurate are AI budget suggestions?
faq.a5: AI budget suggestions are based on real wedding cost data and regional averages. They provide a strong starting point that you should adjust based on your specific vendors and preferences. The AI learns from your inputs and refines suggestions as you add more details.

cta.heading: Experience AI-Powered Wedding Planning
cta.subheading: Join thousands of couples using AI to plan smarter, faster, and stress-free. Start with the free plan -- no account needed.
